title: mentha × rotundifolia var. webberi
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia var. webberi, also known as Cornish mint or Webber's mint, is a variety of mint plant that is native to the UK. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and combat bacterial infections due to its antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mentha × rotundifolia var. webberi include relief from nausea, headaches, and sore throats, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
